category_sources: Official Tanka site describes Grafana Tanka as a robust configuration utility for Kubernetes clusters powered by Jsonnet; source_facts.description also says it provides Kubernetes configuration using Jsonnet.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site title and navigation use Grafana Tanka.
docs_sources: Official tanka.dev site is a dedicated documentation surface with installation, tutorial, writing Jsonnet, libraries, advanced features, and reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/grafana/tanka; repo not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Tanka site describes Kubernetes configuration with Jsonnet and links to installation and reference documentation; source_facts.executables lists tk.
